title: delegate_to_child.input
description: Input for delegate_to_child — forward the inbound message to one direct child and await the child's response within the turn budget. Records an OrchestrationDecision with kind=delegate (ADR-0039 §4).

address.description: Canonical scheme:no-dash-hex address of a direct child.

message.description: The message payload to deliver to the child. Opaque to the platform; the runtime decides the shape.

reason.description: Optional rationale recorded verbatim on the OrchestrationDecision. Never the model's hidden chain-of-thought.
